summary: E2E plan covers all 3 E2E cases (TC-ROLE-100/101/102) against the role management page at /system/role. Selectors are grep-derived from web/src/views/system/role/index.vue; fallback chains documented for known fragile NaiveUI patterns. Auth (logged_in_page fixture), data setup (3 NEW helpers + 3 NEW fixtures), and API-driven verification strategy are concrete. Four Needs Review items are non-blocking, all related to known UI-string variability. .aws/data-knowledge.yaml present. No blockers. Plan is codegen-ready with documented warnings.

needs_review.question: Authorize dialog save button text — fallback chain tries '保存' then '确定'. Acceptable or should one be canonical?
needs_review.reason: NR-E2E-01 documents this; UI strings vary across NaiveUI dialog variants. Fallback chain is the safest approach without further inspection.

needs_review.question: NaiveUI tree-node check pattern uses get_by_text primary, .n-tree-node-content__text fallback. Acceptable for tree-node interaction?
needs_review.reason: NR-E2E-02; NaiveUI tree internals can shift between minor versions. Fallback locator is robustness backstop.

needs_review.question: Search button '查询' may not exist; plan falls back to keyboard Enter. Confirm acceptable.
needs_review.reason: NR-E2E-03; index.vue does not show explicit search button. Enter-key fallback exercises the same query path.

needs_review.question: Authorize success toast wording variance — code accepts regex '保存成功|更新成功|设置成功'. Acceptable?
needs_review.reason: NR-E2E-04; toast text not verifiable from source code without backend running. Regex is the right risk-managed approach.
